name: CyberArk
description: CyberArk Privileged Access Management (PAM) platform that secures, manages, and monitors privileged accounts across your infrastructure.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your CyberArk PVWA web interface
2. Ensure the CyberArk user has API access permissions
3. Enter your PVWA server URL (e.g., https://your-cyberark-instance.com)
4. Enter the username and password for the API user

checks.name: Secure Secrets
checks.description: Verify that safes and vaults exist to securely store privileged accounts and secrets

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Verify that employee user accounts are properly managed within CyberArk

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Verify that role-based access controls are configured through user groups and permissions
